changelog: Promoted 6 canary8 tasks from r5_final unresolved to resolved after approved fixes: materialize5 solution.sh symlinks, fixed-digest smoke for tqdm/toml task images, and Pod A privileged oracle c1 rerun.
Dual-sign record: surface55 executed canary8 and wrote machine-readable summary; surface85 review PASS was reported by orchestrator before this canonical map update.
Canonical r5_final is preserved; this r6 file is the new map version and does not mutate prior evidence.
notes: This is an oracle infra map, not a true-model score.
sam-cell-seg canary strict summary contains external_network_marker=1 from a PyTorch SECURITY.md warning URL string; no infra_fail/parse/timeout was recorded and the task is resolved.
make-doom-for-mips remains unresolved as X11 closure candidate; evaluate separately whether virtual display/X11 headers are our environment gap.

rows.notes: agent51 single-task fix/verify merged after audit challenge
r5d dataset patch resolved; strict summary clean_with_warnings

Pod A canary8 reached oracle/test injection under r7 digest; HTTPS deploy test still fails with git clone protocol error `bad line length character: Welc`. surface55 executed; surface85 review PASS per orchestrator approval.
agent51 single-task fix/verify merged after audit challenge
agent51 single-task fix/verify merged after audit challenge

Pod A canary8 reached oracle/test injection after symlink materialize; oracle compile still fails on `doomgeneric_xlib.c:11:10: fatal error: 'X11/Xlib.h' file not found`, so frame.bmp is never produced. Follow-up: evaluate whether this is our missing virtual-display/X11 closure. surface55 executed; surface85 review PASS per orchestrator approval.
